title: Xtra Crispy Korean Wholegrain Bread Toast
description: A quick-fix Korean dish featuring wholegrain bread, this recipe is a briny and aerated treat that is vegan-friendly, made with a reduced amount of ingredients for simplicity.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a small bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Brush the mixture evenly onto each slice of wholegrain bread.
Drizzle sesame oil over the bread slices.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and salt over the bread.
Place the bread slices on the preheated skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is crispy and golden brown.
Flip the bread slices over and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the bread from the skillet and top with thinly sliced scallions.
